title: Transaksi Janggal Larut Malam
theme: Menemukan keanehan tersembunyi dan komedi gelap dalam interaksi pelanggan sehari-hari di sebuah minimarket yang monoton, memicu pertanyaan tentang motif di balik hal-hal kecil.

cover.prompt: Cinematic photography of a 24-hour convenience store interior at 3 AM. A wide shot looking down a long, neatly stocked aisle, showcasing rows of everyday products under a soft, cool ambient glow from ceiling lights. Shallow depth of field, with focus on the mid-ground shelves, creating a gentle blur in the foreground and background. The scene conveys a tranquil, monotonous atmosphere, reflecting the quiet routine of the early morning. No discernible people in detail, only the environment and its objects.
cover.style: Cinematic photography, shallow depth of field, cool ambient glow, soft color grading

meta.plan_summary: A cynical night-shift convenience store cashier becomes intrigued by a mysterious regular customer who consistently buys strange, illogical items. His investigation into the odd transactions leads to an absurd and comical revelation about the customer's true, mundane motives, bringing a new, ironic perspective to his monotonous routine.
meta.target_emotion: Amusement, curiosity, and a sense of ironic understanding
